---
title: "Memoir of the Right Hon. Sir John Patteson"
---

## Memoir of the Right Hon. Sir John Patteson

**Author:** P. C.
**Date:** 1861 or 1862
**Imprint:** London: Emily Faithfull, the Victoria Press

### Notes

This seems likely to be \'Mr Comyns memoir\' to which CMY refers.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
